summary: Completed comprehensive testing of three main changes: 1) Removed Manual Now Playing Override from admin Stream Settings, 2) Fixed now playing display to show 'The Beat 515'/'Now Streaming Live' when no song info, 3) Profile is now a slide-in drawer from navbar. All features working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: Admin login with correct credentials (admin@thebeat515.com)
Backend: GET /api/stream-config returns correct CDN URL
Backend: PUT /api/stream-config works for updating stream configuration
Backend: All admin endpoints (stats, users, requests, roles, permissions) working
Frontend: Homepage displays 'The Beat 515' and 'Now Streaming Live' when no song metadata
Frontend: Admin login flow works correctly
Frontend: Profile drawer opens from navbar when clicking user avatar
Frontend: Profile drawer contains all required elements (avatar, name, email, role badge, stats, quick actions)
Frontend: Profile drawer edit functionality works (name and bio editing)
Frontend: Profile drawer close button works
Frontend: Profile drawer sign out button works correctly
Frontend: Admin Stream Settings shows only stream URL config (no manual override)
Frontend: Stream Settings has correct CDN URL pre-filled
Frontend: Stream Settings has Station Name and Tagline fields
Frontend: Stream Settings SAVE STREAM CONFIG button works
Frontend: Stream Settings shows Automatic Updates info card
Frontend: Manual Now Playing Override section correctly removed
